name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a new feature for UIForge
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature solves.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Description of any alternative solutions you've considered.

## Use Cases

Who would use this feature? What would it enable?

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
